---
name: Model / provider support
about: Request support for a new LLM provider or model
labels: model-support
---

**Which LLM provider or model do you want Typlx to support?**
e.g. Mistral, Cohere, Together.ai, a specific Ollama model tag

**Does the provider have an OpenAI-compatible API?**
Yes / No / Unsure

**Why is this provider useful for privacy-conscious users?**
e.g. "Self-hostable", "EU-based data residency", "Open weights"

**Are you able to test during development?**
Yes / No (having access to a test account helps us ship faster)
